questions.q: Which Article of the Constitution guarantees Equality before Law?
questions.explanation: Article 14 ensures equality before law and equal protection of laws.

questions.q: Which Fundamental Right is known as the heart and soul of the Constitution?

questions.explanation: Article 17 abolishes untouchability and forbids its practice in any form.

questions.q: Freedom of Speech and Expression is guaranteed under which Article?
questions.explanation: Article 19(1)(a) provides freedom of speech and expression.

questions.q: Which Article deals with Protection of Life and Personal Liberty?
questions.explanation: Article 21 ensures protection of life and personal liberty.

questions.q: Which of the following rights is NOT a Fundamental Right?
questions.explanation: Right to Property is now a legal right under Article 300A, not a Fundamental Right.

questions.q: Which Article prohibits discrimination on grounds of religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth?
questions.explanation: Article 15 prohibits discrimination on specified grounds.

questions.q: Which writ is issued to produce a person before the court?
questions.explanation: Habeas Corpus is issued to bring a person before the court to examine legality of detention.

questions.q: Which Article deals with protection in respect of conviction for offences?
questions.explanation: Article 20 provides protection against ex-post facto laws, double jeopardy, and self-incrimination.

questions.q: Which Fundamental Right is related to freedom of religion?
questions.explanation: Articles 25 to 28 deal with freedom of religion.
